markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the company that owns the model that has the third-highest arena rank (Style Control On) based on the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard (https://lmarena.ai/) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on April 30, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

Results from the "Rank" column under the "Text Arena | Overall" Leaderboard tab at https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with style control on will be used to resolve this market.

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. If two or more models are tied on rank, they will be ordered by their Arena score, including any underlying, unrounded, granular values reflected in the data below the leaderboard. If a tie remains, alphabetical order of company names as listed in this market group will be used as a final tiebreaker (e.g., if the two models are tied by exact arena score, “Google” would be ranked ahead of “xAI”). This market will resolve based on the company that occupies third place under this ranking system.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and will resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket overwhelmingly favors Anthropic at 97.5% implied probability for holding the #3 spot on the LMArena Chatbot Arena Text leaderboard (Style Control On) by end of April, driven by the latest update one day ago positioning its Claude Opus 4.6 model at #3 with a 1497 Elo rating—trailing only two superior in-house variants at 1503 and 1502, while leading Google's Gemini 3.1 Pro preview (1493) by four points. This reflects aggregated user votes from millions of blind pairwise battles, underscoring Claude's competitive edge in reasoning, coding, and creative tasks amid the frontier AI race. Strong positioning stems from no recent challengers overtaking despite OpenAI's GPT-5.5 High lagging at #7 (1488 Elo); realistic threats include a last-minute model release from Google, xAI, or Meta surging via rapid voting, though leaderboard stability near resolution minimizes such risks.

markets.question: Will FK Shakhtar Donetsk win on 2026-04-30?
markets.description:
In the upcoming game, scheduled for April 30, 2026
If FK Shakhtar Donetsk wins, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve "No".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: FK Shakhtar Donetsk vs. Crystal Palace FC
events.description: This event is for the upcoming UEFA Europa Conference League game, scheduled for Thursday, April 30, 2026 between FK Shakhtar Donetsk and Crystal Palace FC.

eventMetadata.context_description: Crystal Palace hold a slim 47.5% trader consensus as favorites in this UEFA Conference League semi-final first leg at neutral Stadion Miejski im. Henryka Reymana in Krakow, reflecting their Premier League pedigree and Ismaila Sarr's hot form with seven goals, including four in recent knockout ties, despite key absences like Cheick Doucoure, Evann Guessand, and Eddie Nketiah, plus Tyrick Mitchell doubtful. Shakhtar Donetsk, fully fit with Dmytro Kryskiv back and Brazilian attackers Alisson, Kaua Elias, and Newerton primed after a 3-1 Ukrainian Premier League win over Kudrivka, trail at 24.5% due to Palace's European momentum from a 4-2 aggregate quarter-final win over Fiorentina. The 28.5% draw probability underscores a closely contested matchup with no head-to-head history.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Chengdu be 13°C on May 1?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Chengdu Shuangliu International Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 1 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Chengdu Shuangliu International Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/cn/chengdu/ZUUU.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket implies a 52% probability for Chengdu's highest temperature reaching 22°C or higher on May 1, closely tracking the latest short-range forecasts from the China Meteorological Administration (CMA), which project a daytime high near 22°C at Shuangliu Airport amid overcast skies and light rain chances. This positioning reflects recent observational data, including April 29's confirmed 23°C peak and April 30's daytime readings around 22°C, with persistent cloud cover suppressing solar insolation below May's climatological average of 26°C. Ensemble guidance from global models like ECMWF and GFS aligns on mild conditions driven by a stable high-pressure ridge and frontal moisture, though final CMA bulletins and intraday observations could refine probabilities before resolution.

markets.question: Elon Bull Run Parlay
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if all of the following conditions are met between January 1 and December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET:

- Elon Musk trillionaire
- Another Elon baby
- 9+ SpaceX Starship launches reach space

Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market will remain open until it is confirmed that at least one of the above conditions has not been met, or until all of the above conditions have been met within the specified timeframe.

The full rules for this market can be found here: 
https://polymarket-upload.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/Elon+Bull+Run+Parlay.pdf

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket prices "No" at 86% for the Elon Bull Run Parlay, reflecting the multiplicative improbability of all three 2026 milestones—trillionaire status via Bloomberg Billionaires Index, confirmation of another Musk child, and 9+ SpaceX Starship launches reaching 62-mile altitude—given zero qualifying Starship flights year-to-date and cadence delays pushing Flight 12 into May. Tesla's April 24 Q1 earnings beat EPS expectations at $0.41 but triggered a muted stock response amid softening EV demand and intensifying Chinese competition, leaving Musk's net worth around $800-850 billion despite February's SpaceX-xAI merger valuing the combined entity at $1.25 trillion. Absent credible pregnancy reports and with SpaceX IPO rumors unconfirmed, traders see slim odds of syncing these high-bar tech achievements; Q2 Tesla deliveries and Starship test successes could catalyze shifts.

markets.question: Will Robinhood Markets, Inc. (HOOD) hit (HIGH) $100 in April?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during April 2026, any 1-minute candle for Robinhood Markets, Inc. (HOOD) has a final "High" price equal to or above the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the Robinhood Markets, Inc. (HOOD) "High" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.HOOD%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.HOOD%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily high price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

events.title: What will Robinhood Markets, Inc. (HOOD) hit in April 2026?
events.description: What will Robinhood Markets, Inc. (HOOD) hit in April 2026?

eventMetadata.context_description: Robinhood Markets (HOOD) shares tumbled 13% to $71.20 on April 29 after Q1 2026 earnings revealed a revenue miss at $1.07 billion—up 15% year-over-year but short of estimates—driven by a 47% plunge in crypto trading volumes amid subdued digital asset activity. Prediction markets revenue overtook crypto for the first time, signaling diversification gains, while net income hit $350 million with EPS of $0.38 slightly below forecasts. At a $64 billion market cap, trailing P/E of 34.6, and forward P/E of 32, trader sentiment reflects fintech volatility tied to retail flows and macro risk appetite. Analyst targets average $99-$105 post-earnings cuts; Q2 results due July 29 could sway April monthly highs amid ongoing international push.
